settings.description: A comprehensive directory for AI prompts, tools, and creations.

prompts.title: Young Woman with Goldfish
prompts.promptText: A serene and intimate scene featuring a young woman with flowing black hair, gently interacting with a group of vibrant orange goldfish. She is wearing a flowing red dress that contrasts beautifully with the dark, moody background. The setting appears to be underwater or in a dimly lit room with water elements, creating a tranquil and ethereal atmosphere. The lighting highlights her gentle smile and the delicate movement of the goldfish, emphasizing a sense of connection and peace.

prompts.title: New Year celebration scene
prompts.promptText: A young woman celebrating New Year in a cozy atmosphere with festive decorations and winter elements.

prompts.promptText: A cute chubby baby with blue eyes wearing a Christmas tree costume.

prompts.promptText: A mystical pathway winding through an ancient forest, glowing mushrooms and ethereal light filtering through the canopy.

prompts.title: Steampunk Inventor's Workshop
prompts.promptText: A cluttered steampunk inventor's workshop filled with brass gears, steam-powered contraptions, and glowing blueprints.

prompts.title: Astronaut on an Alien Planet
prompts.promptText: A lone astronaut exploring the rugged terrain of an alien planet with two moons in the sky.

prompts.title: Cozy Cabin in the Snow
prompts.promptText: A cozy wooden cabin nestled in a snowy landscape, warm light glowing from the windows under a starry night sky.

prompts.title: Dragon Guarding a Treasure
prompts.promptText: A massive, ancient dragon sleeping on a mountain of gold and jewels inside a dark, cavernous lair.

prompts.title: Futuristic Racing Car
prompts.promptText: A sleek, aerodynamic futuristic racing car speeding down a neon-lit track, leaving a trail of light behind.

prompts.title: Underwater Coral Reef
prompts.promptText: A vibrant underwater coral reef teeming with colorful tropical fish and rays of sunlight piercing the water.

prompts.title: Vintage Coffee Shop
prompts.promptText: A charming vintage coffee shop with wooden furniture, warm lighting, and the steam rising from a fresh cup of coffee.

prompts.title: Samurai in a Bamboo Forest
prompts.promptText: A lone samurai standing in a dense bamboo forest, sunlight filtering through the leaves, hand resting on his katana.

prompts.promptText: A magical floating island suspended in the sky, complete with waterfalls cascading into the clouds below.

prompts.promptText: A cute, futuristic robot pet dog playing with a glowing ball in a modern apartment.

prompts.title: Gothic Cathedral Interior
prompts.promptText: The grand interior of a gothic cathedral, with sunlight streaming through intricate stained-glass windows.

prompts.title: Post-Apocalyptic Survivor

prompts.title: Retro Arcade Room

prompts.title: Majestic Lion Portrait

prompts.title: Space Station Orbiting Earth
prompts.promptText: A massive, futuristic space station orbiting high above the Earth, with the blue planet visible in the background.

prompts.title: Enchanted Library
prompts.promptText: An enchanted library with towering bookshelves, floating books, and glowing magical orbs providing light.

prompts.title: Desert Oasis at Sunset
prompts.promptText: A tranquil desert oasis with palm trees and a clear pool of water, illuminated by the warm colors of a setting sun.
